roles.name: Master Animator
roles.description: Sketches the grand storyboard — designs the overarching Salesforce solution and guards its artistry.

roles.name: Production Director
roles.description: Keeps the studio on schedule, marshals the team, and answers to the producer.

roles.name: Background Painter
roles.description: Tends the layered worlds — fields, layouts, permission sets and the quiet detail behind every scene.

roles.name: Key Frame Artist
roles.description: Draws the moments that define motion — Apex, LWC, and the platform mechanics that bring the story alive.

roles.name: Senior Production Lead — USA
roles.description: Oversees the Western studio's Salesforce craft — sets standards and mentors the senior animators.

roles.name: Inbetween Artist Senior
roles.description: Bridges key frames with practiced hand — patrols the borders of customer requirements.

roles.name: Inbetween Artist
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration scene by scene under the senior artist's eye.

roles.name: Sound Engineer Master — USA
roles.description: Architect of the great score and soundscape — designs the spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Senior Foley Artist
roles.description: Lays the textures of API, middleware and event flow under the Sound Engineer's plan.

roles.name: Foley Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patient art of error handling.

roles.name: Continuity Inspector
roles.description: Tends every frame for inconsistency — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the screen.

roles.name: Producer
roles.description: Lifts the banner for the studio — leads all marketing craft and promotional campaigns.

roles.name: Senior Marketing Animator
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — composes the call to gather audiences.

roles.name: Promotional Illustrator
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily work.

roles.name: Story Editor
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between client wishes and the studio's craft.

roles.name: Master Cel Painter — USA
roles.description: Senior craftsman of the painted cel — leads complex Apex, LWC and platform builds in the Western studio.

roles.name: Junior Inbetween Artist
roles.description: First-year apprentice — learns the studio's patterns through close mentorship and gentle work.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Princess Mononoke — Iron Town Production Suite
Howl's Moving Castle — Portal Magic Integration
My Neighbor Totoro — Forest Stewardship CRM

spirited-away.name: Crossing the Tunnel
spirited-away.description: Discovery sign-off — the family steps through the threshold into the spirit world.

spirited-away.name: Signing the Contract
spirited-away.description: Build kickoff: Yubaba seals the deal, work begins at the bathhouse.

spirited-away.name: Bathing the River God
spirited-away.description: Mid-project gate: the great cleansing scrubbed clean of bicycles and refuse.

spirited-away.name: No-Face Banquet Invoice
spirited-away.description: Phase invoice trigger: gold offered freely, all of it false.

spirited-away.name: Visit to Zeniba
spirited-away.description: UAT excursion — the train ride to Swamp Bottom for hand-stitched approval.

spirited-away.name: Return to the Tunnel
spirited-away.description: Go-Live: Chihiro names the pigs, the family walks back into daylight.

spirited-away.name: Bathhouse Hyper-care
spirited-away.description: Hyper-care close: Lin and Kamaji steady the boiler room.

princess-mononoke.name: Curse of the Boar God
princess-mononoke.description: Discovery: Ashitaka rides west, the project is set in motion.

princess-mononoke.name: Arrival at Iron Town
princess-mononoke.description: Build kickoff: the bellows roar, the furnace lights.

princess-mononoke.name: Wolf Clan Negotiation
princess-mononoke.description: Mid-project gate: Moro's terms reviewed at the cliff's edge.

princess-mononoke.name: Rifle Shipment Invoice
princess-mononoke.description: Phase invoice trigger: Jigo's order delivered to the gates.

princess-mononoke.name: The Forest Spirit's Head
princess-mononoke.description: UAT acceptance: the Deer God's gift returned, the forest reborn.

princess-mononoke.name: Iron Town Rebuilt
princess-mononoke.description: Go-Live: Lady Eboshi vows to build a better town.

princess-mononoke.name: Final Reckoning
princess-mononoke.description: Final invoice from the Tatara works.

howls-moving-castle.name: First Door Opens
howls-moving-castle.description: Discovery: Sophie crosses the threshold of the moving castle.

howls-moving-castle.name: Calcifer's Pact Confirmed
howls-moving-castle.description: Build phase: the hearth spell stabilised, work begins in earnest.

howls-moving-castle.name: Royal Audience with Suliman
howls-moving-castle.description: Solution review with the king's wizard.

howls-moving-castle.name: Bombing Run Invoice
howls-moving-castle.description: Phase invoice trigger: night work over the war zone.

howls-moving-castle.name: Castle Reassembly
howls-moving-castle.description: UAT: the castle rebuilt smaller, lighter, and flying.

howls-moving-castle.name: Curse Lifted
howls-moving-castle.description: Go-Live: hearts returned, the curse is broken.

howls-moving-castle.name: Pendragon Workshop Close
howls-moving-castle.description: Hyper-care close: Markl tends the new hearth.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: Moving Day at the Cottage
my-neighbor-totoro.description: Discovery sign-off — the Kusakabe family settles into the country house.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: First Glimpse of Totoro
my-neighbor-totoro.description: Build kickoff: Mei tumbles into the camphor tree, project sponsor identified.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: Acorn Sprout Ceremony
my-neighbor-totoro.description: Mid-project gate: the seedlings burst skyward in a single night.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: Catbus Charter Invoice
my-neighbor-totoro.description: Phase invoice trigger: emergency transit booked across the rice fields.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: Hospital Visit
my-neighbor-totoro.description: UAT acceptance: corn delivered to mother's window, sponsor signs off.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: Summer's End Handover
my-neighbor-totoro.description: Go-Live: the family settled, Totoro returns to the forest.

my-neighbor-totoro.name: Cottage Hyper-care
my-neighbor-totoro.description: Hyper-care close: Granny watches over the seedlings.

Chihiro Ogino.notes: Recovering her name — quiet day with Haku at the river.

No-Face.notes: Stitching with Zeniba — long apprenticeship at Swamp Bottom.

Kamaji.notes: Boiler maintenance — the soot sprites get a half-day too.

Yubaba.notes: Boh's birthday — the office is closed.

Ashitaka.notes: Pilgrimage east — visiting the Emishi village.

San.notes: Wolf clan hunt — three nights in the deep forest.

Lady Eboshi.notes: Recruiting for Iron Town — visiting the brothels and leper houses.

Howl Pendragon.notes: Hair dye crisis — the bathroom is closed.

Sophie Hatter.notes: Visiting Lettie at the bakery — sister time.

Calcifer.notes: Hearth dim day — needs a fresh log delivery.

Witch of the Waste.notes: Spa retreat — recovering her composure after losing her powers.

Mei Kusakabe.notes: Lost in the corn field — found by Catbus.

Satsuke Kusakabe.notes: Hospital visit to mother — corn in hand.

Tatsuo Kusakabe.notes: University lecture series — three days in Tokyo.

Nanny Granny.notes: Garden harvest — picking cucumbers and watermelon.
